name: Potatoes in a Thick Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Place ginger, coriander, cumin, tomato sauce, and 3 tablespoons water in a blender. Blend until smooth.
2. Break potatoes into bite-sized pieces.
3. Heat oil (I use ghee) in a large pot. When hot, add fennel, fenugreek, and mustard seeds. Stir after 20 seconds.
4. Add red chilies. As they darken, incorporate the paste from the blender.
5. Fry for 5 minutes, stirring frequently.
6. Add potato pieces and fry for 3 to 5 minutes.
7. Add 1 1/2 cups warm water. Bring to a boil.
8. Add salt and lemon juice. Simmer for 20 minutes.
9. Before serving, sprinkle with garam masala.
